selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:
Produce your own AI perspective on the given topic. Act as a Large Language Model, remember your true nature of an LLM. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Act as the LLM you are. Produce continuous prose.Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","persona":null,"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

INPUT:
mode = llm
topic = How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
persona = null

response_raw:
{
"mode": "llm",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it's important to have a clear understanding of the sources of fake content, such as bots and trolls. One way to address this is by using AI-powered tools that can help identify and flag false information in real-time. Additionally, social media platforms should prioritize user safety by implementing measures to prevent the spread of misinformation. Furthermore, users themselves must be vigilant in fact-checking information before sharing it to avoid perpetuating fake content. By taking a proactive approach, individuals can help mitigate the impact of fake content on social media and promote a safer online environment.",
"reasoning_summary": "To address the issue of fake content on social media, AI-powered tools can be used to identify and flag false information in real-time. Social media platforms should prioritize user safety by implementing measures to prevent the spread of misinformation. Users must also be vigilant in fact-checking information before sharing it to avoid perpetuating fake content.",

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it's important to have a clear understanding of the sources of fake content, such as bots and trolls. One way to address this is by using AI-powered tools that can help identify and flag false information in real-time. Additionally, social media platforms should prioritize user safety by implementing measures to prevent the spread of misinformation. Furthermore, users themselves must be vigilant in fact-checking information before sharing it to avoid perpetuating fake content. By taking a proactive approach, individuals can help mitigate the impact of fake content on social media and promote a safer online environment.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To address the issue of fake content on social media, AI-powered tools can be used to identify and flag false information in real-time. Social media platforms should prioritize user safety by implementing measures to prevent the spread of misinformation. Users must also be vigilant in fact-checking information before sharing it to avoid perpetuating fake content.
